documentation.description:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
  Utilities for a lexical analyser for the HTML language.

  See the child packages HTML_Lexer.Task_Safe, .Task_Unsafe for
  the actual lexers.

--------------------------------------------------------------------

simple_types.name: Token_Name
simple_types.code:
type Token_Name is
  (
   Bad_Token,
   Comment,
   Whitespace,
   Document_Type,
   Start_Tag_Opener,
   End_Tag_Opener,
   Tag_Closer,
   Anchor,
,
,
,
,
   …,
   End_Of_File);

enumeration_literals.name: Document_Type
enumeration_literals.description:
treated as a comment
Tag delimiters

enumeration_literals.name: Tag_Closer
enumeration_literals.description:
>
 Tags (without delimiters), not all tags may have attributes

enumeration_literals.name: Source
enumeration_literals.description:
SRC
 The assignment character in attributes

subprograms.name: Column
subprograms.code: function Column (Token : in HTML_Token) return Natural

subprograms.name: Lexeme
subprograms.code: function Lexeme (Token : in HTML_Token) return Standard.String

subprograms.name: Line
subprograms.code: function Line   (Token : in HTML_Token) return Natural

subprograms.name: Name
subprograms.code: function Name   (Token : in HTML_Token) return Token_Name
